title: Signs High Cortisol Is Sabotaging Your Weight After 40
seo_title: Signs High Cortisol Is Affecting Your Weight After 40
meta_description: Chronically elevated cortisol causes belly fat, muscle loss, and cravings after 40. Learn the key signs your cortisol is too high and what helps bring it back into balance.
tags: Hormones, Cortisol, Stress, Weight Gain, Menopause, Women Over 40
